Schwab Asset Management Announces ETF Share Splits

holdings.infoBox: SCHV is an equity ETF with a total of 560 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 3.99%, Berkshire Hathaway at 2.85%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 2.75%, Johnson & Johnson at 1.91%, and Intel at 1.89%.

overview.description: The Schwab U.S. Large-Cap Value ETF (SCHV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of value stocks based on terms of projected, current and historical metrics. SCHV was launched on Dec 11, 2009 and is issued by Charles Schwab.
infoTable: Dow Jones US Total Stock Market Large-Cap Value
